data.title: HeartSciences COO and Longtime Board Member Passes Away
data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Heart Test Laboratories, Inc. ( (HSCS) ).

On April 1, 2026, HeartSciences Inc. announced that Chief Operating Officer, Corporate Secretary and longtime board member Mark Hilz passed away at age 67 after a period of illness, following his service on the board since 2013 and in executive roles since March 2022. The company stated it does not plan to replace the COO role and does not expect his death to alter its operations or the planned commercialization of its MyoVista Insights platform, including the MyoVista wavECG device, which was submitted to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration in December 2025 for 510(k) clearance.

Technical indicators add further pressure with the stock trading below major moving averages and negative MACD, while valuation provides little support due to a negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on HSCS stock, click here.

More about Heart Test Laboratories, Inc.

HeartSciences Inc. operates in the medical technology sector, focusing on cardiovascular diagnostics through its MyoVista Insights software platform and MyoVista wavECG device. The company targets improvements in heart disease detection using advanced ECG-based analysis and is progressing its flagship device through the U.S. regulatory clearance process.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

The latest update is out from SharpLink Gaming ( (SBET) ).

On April 3, 2026, Sharplink, Inc. entered into mutual termination agreements with Galaxy Digital Capital Management LP and ParaFi Capital LP to end asset management arrangements, originally signed on May 30, 2025, covering discretionary investment management services for the company’s Ethereum purchases. These asset management agreements will terminate effective May 31, 2026, with no termination fees or penalties owed, and no remaining obligations beyond amounts specified in the termination terms.

Sharplink emphasized that the move reflects the ongoing evolution of its Ether treasury strategy and the addition of internal asset management personnel, rather than any disagreement with Galaxy or ParaFi. Following these terminations, there is no material relationship between the company and either firm, underscoring a shift toward managing its digital asset treasury in-house and potentially altering its reliance on external crypto asset managers going forward.

The most recent analyst rating on (SBET) stock is a Hold with a $6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SharpLink Gaming stock, see the SBET Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SBET is a Neutral.

Offsetting factors include a more constructive earnings-call outlook tied to the ETH treasury/staking strategy and low reported leverage, but valuation support is limited due to negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SBET stock, click here.

More about SharpLink Gaming

Sharplink, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated company that has pursued an Ether (ETH) treasury strategy, historically relying on external digital asset managers to provide discretionary investment management services for its Ethereum purchases. The company is now evolving its approach by adding internal asset management personnel, reducing dependence on third-party managers Galaxy Digital Capital Management LP and ParaFi Capital LP.

On April 2, 2026, Advanced Biomed Inc. agreed to acquire Acellent Technologies (Hong Kong) Co. Limited, a provider of AI-powered financial verification and audit solutions, by purchasing 100% of its equity from the sole shareholder. The consideration will be paid in 270,000 shares of Advanced Biomed common stock, valued at an estimated $4.00 per share, for a total implied price of about $1.08 million.

The transaction remains subject to completion of financial and legal due diligence on Acellent Technologies, as well as receipt of all required regulatory approvals before closing. If completed, the deal would add AI-driven financial verification capabilities to Advanced Biomed’s offerings, signaling a diversification of its operations and potentially enhancing its technological infrastructure and cross-industry positioning.

More about Advanced Biomed Inc.

data.title: Curaleaf Discloses Extended Automatic Share Sale Plan for Chief Legal Officer
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Curaleaf Holdings ( (TSE:CURA) ) has issued an announcement.

Curaleaf Holdings said on April 2, 2026, that Chief Legal Officer Peter Clateman has extended an automatic securities disposition plan, effective March 31, 2026, to manage the orderly exercise of vested stock options expiring in July 2027. The plan provides for the sale of a portion of his subordinate voting shares at prevailing market prices to cover anticipated taxes, with trades to be executed by an independent broker between around July 1, 2026 and year-end under pre-set trading parameters and reported through standard Canadian securities disclosure systems.

The company emphasized that the ASDP was approved by its compensation committee before a blackout period and includes meaningful limits on Clateman’s ability to amend, suspend or terminate it. By disclosing the ASDP in line with Canadian regulatory guidance, Curaleaf aims to enhance transparency around insider share dispositions, which may help reassure investors that upcoming executive share sales are pre-planned and not driven by undisclosed corporate developments.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CURA) stock is a Hold with a C$3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Curaleaf Holdings stock, see the TSE:CURA Stock Forecast page.

data.title: U-BX Technology Reports Sharp Revenue and Margin Declines in H2 2025 Filing
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from U-BX Technology Ltd. ( (UBXG) ).

On April 3, 2025, U-BX Technology Ltd. filed a Form 6-K for April 2026, providing an operating and financial review alongside unaudited consolidated financial statements for the six months ended December 31, 2025 and 2024. The filing shows that revenue fell 33% to $11.65 million over the period, while gross profit dropped 86% to $29,962 as cost of revenue nearly equaled sales.

Management highlights that performance remains sensitive to China’s economic conditions, regulatory changes affecting the insurance and cloud communications sectors, and competition in insurance technology services. The company is focusing on acquiring new institutional customers, deepening relationships with existing insurers, and pursuing strategic investments and acquisitions to strengthen its technology capabilities and market position despite recent margin pressure.

More about U-BX Technology Ltd.

U-BX Technology Ltd., incorporated in the Cayman Islands in 2021, operates through subsidiaries in Beijing, Suzhou and Jiangsu, providing AI-driven value-added services to China’s insurance industry. Its core offerings include digital promotion for insurers and brokers, algorithm-based auto insurance risk assessment via its “Magic Mirror” model, and bundled customer benefits such as car wash and maintenance plans.

The company serves more than 300 city-level property and auto insurance carriers nationwide, including major players such as PICC, China Pacific Property Insurance and China Life Property Insurance. It also distributes insurance-related content to consumers through mini-apps on social media platforms to build brand awareness and support brokers.

Average Trading Volume: 13,503

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $54.21M

data.title: Citigroup Restructures Segment Reporting and Capital Allocation
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Citigroup ( (C) ) has provided an update.

Citigroup has reorganized its segment reporting for the first quarter of 2026, moving its Retail Banking business out of U.S. Personal Banking and into the Wealth segment, while consolidating the remaining U.S. Personal Banking operations into a new U.S. Consumer Cards segment. As part of this shift, the financial results, balance sheet and tangible common equity of the Retail Banking business have been reassigned to Wealth, and prior-period figures have been recast to maintain comparability.

In parallel, Citi revised its internal tangible common equity allocation methodology among its Services, Markets and Banking segments in the first quarter of 2026 to better match capital usage with the shared economics of corporate lending across these businesses. The change increases TCE and revenues for Services and Markets, reduces both for Banking, eliminates a legacy corporate lending revenue share line and leaves the firm’s consolidated results and overall TCE unchanged for all periods presented.

The most recent analyst rating on (C) stock is a Buy with a $146.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Citigroup stock, see the C Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on C Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, C is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects mixed financial performance led by weak recent cash-flow consistency and higher leverage, partially offset by a constructive earnings-call outlook (NII growth, efficiency improvements, ROTCE targets and buybacks). Technicals are broadly neutral and valuation is reasonable with a moderate dividend yield; corporate events add only minor, mixed impact.

To see Spark’s full report on C stock, click here.

More about Citigroup

Citigroup Inc. is a global diversified financial services firm that operates across consumer banking, wealth management and institutional businesses, including services, markets and banking. The company offers retail banking, credit cards and wealth management products, with a significant presence in U.S. personal banking and a strategic focus on aligning capital and reporting with client relationships across segments.

Average Trading Volume: 15,372,714

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $201.6B

The latest update is out from Aeries Technology ( (AERT) ).

On March 31, 2026, Aeries Technology, Inc. received formal notice from Nasdaq that its continued non-compliance with the minimum bid price requirement under Listing Rule 5550(a)(2), following a grace period that expired on March 30, 2026, would result in the delisting of its securities unless it requested a hearing. The company plans to seek a hearing before the Nasdaq Hearings Panel, which will stay immediate delisting, but it is not eligible for an additional grace period due to failing the minimum stockholders’ equity threshold, leaving the outcome of its listing status and the implications for shareholders and market visibility uncertain.

The most recent analyst rating on (AERT) stock is a Hold with a $0.41 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aeries Technology stock, see the AERT Stock Forecast page.

Technicals remain mixed-to-bearish with negative MACD and price below longer-term averages. Valuation looks inexpensive on P/E, but corporate events add both support (buyback) and risk (dilution/financing obligations), keeping the overall score below average.

To see Spark’s full report on AERT stock, click here.

data.description:

Datasea ( (DTSS) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 2, 2026, Datasea Inc. held a special meeting of stockholders in Beijing, where investors voted on a proposed merger with its wholly owned British Virgin Islands subsidiary, Datasea Intelligent Technology Ltd. The Merger Proposal, which will see Datasea Inc. merge into DIT with DIT as the surviving entity, received overwhelming support with 6,535,347 votes in favor, 15,306 against and no abstentions.

Shareholders also approved a share exchange structure tied to the merger, under which the 2,000,000 common shares held by each of Zhixin Liu and Fu Liu will convert into an equal number of Class B ordinary shares of DIT, while all other common shares will convert into Class A ordinary shares on a one-for-one basis. The approval of these measures paves the way for a reorganization of the company’s corporate structure, potentially enhancing governance flexibility and differentiating control rights among key insiders and the broader shareholder base.

data.description:

Moog ( ($MOG.A) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 3, 2026, Moog Inc. fully redeemed all $500 million aggregate principal amount of its 4.250% Senior Notes due 2027 at par, plus accrued and unpaid interest up to but excluding the redemption date. As a result, the related indenture was satisfied and discharged in accordance with its terms.

The company financed the redemption using net proceeds from its previously announced issuance of $500 million of 5.500% Senior Notes due 2034, supplemented by cash on hand. This refinancing shifts Moog’s debt maturity profile further into the future while maintaining its overall debt level, which may improve liquidity planning and provide greater balance sheet flexibility for stakeholders.

Lsb Industries ( (LXU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 30, 2026, LSB Industries director Steven L. Packebush retired from the board, with the company noting his departure was not due to any disagreement over operations or policies, and on April 2, 2026, the board appointed Meridian Infrastructure co-founder and CEO Jonathan Z. Ackerman as a Class 2026 director, with plans for him to stand for reelection at the 2026 annual shareholders’ meeting. Also on April 2, 2026, the board adopted third amended and restated bylaws that modernize the company’s governance practices by updating procedures for electronic communications and virtual meetings, tightening advance notice and disclosure requirements for shareholder nominations and proposals, reserving white proxy cards for the board, and expanding the chair’s authority to manage shareholder meetings, collectively reinforcing control and transparency around director elections and proxy contests.
